# tastytrade Open API Documentation

> tastytrade is a brokerage platform offering trading in equities, options, futures, futures options, and cryptocurrency. The tastytrade Open API is a REST/JSON API that enables developers, fintech platforms, algorithmic traders, and AI/LLM applications to programmatically access account data, place trades, retrieve market data, and stream real-time quotes and account updates. All API requests are authenticated via OAuth2 bearer tokens in the Authorization header. The base URL for production is https://api.tastyworks.com and for sandbox is https://api.cert.tastyworks.com.

## Getting Started
- [Getting Started](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/getting-started.md): Quickstart walkthrough covering sandbox account creation, OAuth2 authentication, submitting a trade, fetching balances and positions, streaming market data, fetching REST market data, streaming account updates, closing a position, and fetching an option chain.
- [Sandbox](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/sandbox.md): Sandbox environment details. Resets every 24 hours. Base URL: api.cert.tastyworks.com. Delayed quotes. Not all services available (no net-liq history, market metrics, or real-time market data in sandbox).
- [SDKs](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/sdk.md): Official SDKs (JavaScript, Postman workspace) and community SDKs (Python - tastyware/tastytrade).
- [FAQ](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/faq.md): Frequently asked questions covering unconfirmed_user errors, invalid_credentials, 401 errors, IP blocking from failed logins, sandbox password reset, quote streaming troubleshooting, and User-Agent header requirements.

## API Overview
- [API Overview](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/api-overview.md): Comprehensive overview covering REST/JSON conventions (dasherized keys, User-Agent header requirement, Content-Type, response envelope with data/context/items), API versioning (Accept-Version header, YYYYMMDD format, 9-month deprecation window), auth patterns (OAuth2 access tokens, 15-minute expiry, Bearer token in Authorization header), tastytrade symbology (equities, OCC equity options, futures with / prefix, future options with ./ prefix, cryptocurrency pairs), error codes (400/401/403/404/422/429/500), and high-level concepts (orders, positions, accounts, trading statuses, balances, transactions, instruments).

## Authentication
- [OAuth2](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/oauth2.md): Complete OAuth2 guide. Covers creating an OAuth application at my.tastytrade.com, generating a personal grant and refresh token, generating 15-minute access tokens via POST /oauth/token, becoming a trusted partner for multi-user apps, authorization code grant flow for third-party apps, token refresh, and two-factor authentication requirements for read/trade scopes.

## Trading
- [Order Submission](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/order-submission.md): Detailed reference for structuring order JSON. Covers order attributes (order-type, price, price-effect, time-in-force, value), leg attributes (action, instrument-type, quantity, symbol), order responses (rejected/accepted with buying-power-effect and fee-calculation), and example requests for equity market orders, equity limit orders, equity option orders, multi-leg spreads (verticals, iron condors, strangles), and fractional stock orders.
- [Order Flow](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/order-flow.md): Order lifecycle documentation. Three phases: Submission (Received, Routed, In Flight, Contingent), Working (Live, Cancel Requested, Replace Requested), and Terminal (Filled, Canceled, Rejected, Expired, Removed). Includes status transition examples for immediate fills, customer cancellations, expired day orders, and brokerage rejections.
- [Order Management](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/order-management.md): API endpoints for managing orders including search/filter orders, live orders, order dry run (pre-flight validation), submit order, cancel order, cancel-replace (modify price/quantity), and complex order operations (submit, cancel for OTO/OCO/OTOCO/BLAST/PAIRS strategies).

## Streaming
- [Streaming Market Data](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/streaming-market-data.md): Real-time market data streaming via DXLink WebSocket. Covers obtaining API quote tokens (GET /api-quote-tokens, 24-hour expiry), DXLink connection protocol (SETUP, AUTHORIZE, CHANNEL_REQUEST, FEED_SETUP, FEED_SUBSCRIPTION, KEEPALIVE), available event types (Profile, Quote, Summary, Trade, Greeks, TimeAndSale), DXLink symbology via streamer-symbol field, COMPACT data format requirement, and candle events for historical OHLC data with period/type configuration and fromTime parameter.
- [Streaming Account Data](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/streaming-account-data.md): Real-time account event streaming via WebSocket. Covers connection setup (open WebSocket, subscribe with auth-token, send heartbeats at 2s-1m intervals), available actions (heartbeat, connect for account updates, public-watchlists-subscribe, quote-alerts-subscribe), notification format (type + full data object + timestamp), order fill notification nuances for multi-leg orders, and hosts (sandbox: wss://streamer.cert.tastyworks.com, production: wss://streamer.tastyworks.com).

## API Reference (Open API Spec)
- [Account Status](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/account-status.md): GET /accounts/{account_number}/trading-status. Returns TradingStatus object with trading permissions, options level, PDT status, day trade count, futures/crypto/equity offering enabled flags, margin call status, and fee schedule.
- [Accounts and Customers](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/accounts-and-customers.md): GET /api-quote-tokens (DXLink streaming token), GET /customers/{customer_id} (full customer profile, use 'me' shortcut), GET /customers/{customer_id}/accounts (all accounts with authority level), GET /customers/{customer_id}/accounts/{account_number} (single account details).
- [Backtesting](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/backtesting.md): Endpoints for running historical options strategy backtests. GET /available-dates, POST /backtests (create), GET /backtests/{id} (results), POST /backtests/{id}/cancel, GET /backtests/{id}/logs, POST /simulate-trade (historical pricing).
- [Balances and Positions](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/balances-and-positions.md): GET /accounts/{account_number}/balances (71-field AccountBalance including cash-balance, net-liquidating-value, buying power, margin requirements, long/short position values), GET /accounts/{account_number}/positions (CurrentPosition with symbol, quantity, average-open-price, mark, multiplier, realized gains, expires-at), GET /accounts/{account_number}/balance-snapshots (historical balance data).
- [Instruments](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/instruments.md): 21 endpoints covering equities, equity options (chains in full/compact/nested format), futures (by symbol/product-code/exchange), futures options (chains by product code), cryptocurrency, warrants, and quantity decimal precisions. Includes full symbology reference.
- [Margin Requirements](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/margin-requirements.md): GET /margin/accounts/{account_number}/requirements (current margin report) and POST /margin/accounts/{account_number}/dry-run (estimate margin impact of a prospective order without placing it).
- [Market Data](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/market-data.md): GET /market-data/by-type with singular hyphenated params (equity, equity-option, future, future-option, cryptocurrency, index). 100 symbol combined limit. Returns bid/ask/mid/mark/last/volume/open/high/low/close/prevClose/yearHigh/yearLow/beta/dividends/tradingHalted. Uses camelCase fields.
- [Market Metrics](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/market-metrics.md): GET /market-metrics?symbols=AAPL,SPY. Returns IV index, IV rank, IV percentile, liquidity metrics, and per-expiration implied volatilities. Also: historical dividends and earnings reports endpoints.
- [Market Sessions](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/market-sessions.md): 11 endpoints for session times across Equity, CME, CFE collections. Current/next/previous sessions, date range queries (max 9 months), holiday calendars. Includes market state field.
- [Net Liquidating Value History](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/net-liquidating-value-history.md): GET /accounts/{accountNumber}/net-liq/history with time-back (1d/1w/1m/3m/6m/1y/all) or start-time/end-time. Returns OHLC candles for net-liq, total, and pending cash values.
- [Orders](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/orders.md): 19 endpoints. Submit (POST), dry-run, cancel (DELETE), replace (PUT), edit (PATCH). Complex orders: OTO, OCO, OTOCO, BLAST, PAIRS. Order types: Limit, Market, Marketable Limit, Notional Market, Stop, Stop Limit. TIF: Day, Ext, GTC, GTD, IOC. Conditional rules with price triggers. Full fill tracking.
- [Quote Alerts](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/quote-alerts.md): CRUD for price alerts. Monitor Last/Bid/Ask/IV with > or < operators. User-scoped, one-shot triggers.
- [Risk Parameters](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/risk-parameters.md): Position limits, per-symbol margin requirements, public risk-free rate configuration, and raw SPAN margin data for CME/CFE.
- [Symbol Search](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/symbol-search.md): GET /symbols/search/{symbol} with prefix matching. Returns symbol, description, listed-market, instrument-type, options availability.
- [Transactions](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/transactions.md): GET /accounts/{account_number}/transactions with extensive filters. 45-field Transaction model with execution details, all fee types, lot data, and cost basis. Also: total-fees endpoint.
- [Watchlists](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/open-api-spec/watchlists.md): Full CRUD for user watchlists, read-only public watchlists, and pairs watchlists. PUT is full replacement.

## API Guides
- [API Guides](https://developer.tastytrade.com/docs/api-guides.md): Consolidated guide covering OAuth2 setup, customer account info, account status, positions, balances, transactions, instruments, margin requirements, and market data workflows.
